reviews.review_title: Not even allowed to start this game...
reviews.review_description:
What kind of garbage is a game that doesn't even allow you to play it?  Well, THIS GAME is that garbage.  Right off the bat, you're asked to login with your name and password, without given the option to create a username and password.  So I downloaded this obscure app for nothing.  So all I can do now is submit my frustration in the form of a review.  
If I could give this horrible app ZERO stars, I'd do so.  But I'm only allowed to give the lowest rating of 1 Star...in which I will do so now.   WORTHLESS APP.
